name: addAbstractExpression
description: Add a symbol to represent an expression to assist proving. It doesn't unfold any logical formula, it only adds an expression to introduce a symbol that represents a predicate. Only call this if the current expressions are too complicated and it's necessary to add some simplifications.

expression.description: The expression must be in the form of ident=expr. The expr must be in the goal or the selected hypothesis.

node_id.description: ID of the node in the proof tree to apply this function on.
